understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) to win the level by navigating through the tile grid, using clicks to remove breakable blocks (x) that obstruct fall paths, while avoiding hazards like spikes (u/v). The player must chain horizontal moves with automatic gravity-based falls to progress toward the goal.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x by 1, then triggers automatic falling in the current gravity direction (DOWN here, decreasing y) until landing on a solid tile (o, m, w) or hazard. CLICK actions remove breakable blocks at target positions without advancing movement or timers. No undo was used. Gravity falls only occur after horizontal moves, not clicks. Limited steps remain per attempt.
